mapper.sql: t0.id, t0.tenant_id, t0.creator, t0.create_stamp, t0.last_editor, t0.last_edit_stamp, t0.property_state, t0.property_name, t0.type, t0.property_type, t0.property_tag, t0.source_type, t0.project_id, t0.project_name, t0.reve_id, t0.province, t0.city, t0.district, t0.address, t0.label, t0.access_way, t0.property_describe, t0.area, t0.asset_use, t0.property_code, t0.property_end_date, t0.property_transfer_ownership, t0.transfer_ownership_remark, t0.debt_repayment_money, t0.original_value, t0.net_worth, t0.disposal_price, t0.Taxe_fee, t0.dispose_fee, t0.original_obligor_fee, t0.profit_and_loss, t0.is_deleted, t0.follow_up_person, t0.property_owner, t0.assert_time, t0.separable, t0.affiliated_unit, t0.land_use_nature
mapper.select: select asset_unit_state as type_id, sum(original_value) as total_money from property_right_info where do_type='PROPERTY_INFO' GROUP BY asset_unit_state

select pi.property_type as type_id, sum(pri.original_value) as total_money from property_info pi left join property_right_info pri on pi.id=pri.do_id where pri.do_type='PROPERTY_INFO' group by pi.property_type
SELECT ,pro.do_id FROM property_info t0 LEFT JOIN property_bill pro ON t0.id = pro.property_id WHERE pro.property_id IS NULL and t0.is_deleted = 0;
